notes: Needs PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=1 in order to run, otherwise it throws an out of memory error. After enabling that parameter, gameplay is perfect with absolutely no issues.
title: Let Them Come

notes: Tried Disabling Esync, "PROTON_OLD_GL_STRING=1", and "PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=1" with the same luck. An Out of Memory pop up without even showing any part of the game.
title: Let Them Come
